axioms.title: Freedom of Information / Informationsfreiheit
axioms.obligation: Complete corresponding source plus SPDX/REUSE metadata must remain publicly retrievable.

axioms.title: Peace Obligation / Friedenspflicht
axioms.obligation: No use for weapons, autonomous lethal systems, rights-violating mass surveillance, or applications whose primary purpose is to harm humans.

axioms.title: Ethics Matrix / Ethik-Matrix
axioms.obligation: Use must respect dignity, charity and hope; discrimination prohibited by the EU Charter is not permitted.

axioms.title: DSA Conformity / DSA-Konformität
axioms.obligation: Intermediary/platform services must provide a working Notice-and-Action mechanism and a point of contact.
